name: Vendor Onboarding
description: Maintenance stages vendor intake, document review, compliance readiness, and setup handoffs before any vendor is activated or made dispatch-eligible.

stages.name: Normalize Vendor Intake
stages.description: Normalize vendor identity, trade, contact, coverage, service area, and source facts.

steps.title: Normalize vendor profile
steps.instructions: Normalize business name, DBA, contacts, email, phone, trade categories, service area, license status, insurance status, W-9 status, agreement status, rate sheet, emergency availability, and source confidence. Missing facts must be null with needs_verification.
steps.dispatch_body: Normalize vendor onboarding facts and missing-data flags. No vendor sends and no system activation.

steps.title: Review vendor intake
steps.instructions: Review whether the vendor should continue onboarding, be rejected, or stay in needs_verification before any vendor-facing request is staged.
steps.human_prompt: Review vendor intake before requesting documents or staging setup.

stages.name: Collect Documents
stages.description: Stage document requests and attach received vendor evidence.

steps.title: Stage vendor document request
steps.instructions: Stage a draft request for missing W-9, COI, license, agreement, rate sheet, trade scope, service area, and emergency availability details. Do not send externally.
steps.dispatch_body: Draft vendor document request only. No external sends.

steps.title: Attach vendor documents
steps.instructions: Attach received W-9, COI, license, agreement, rate sheet, and other setup evidence, or mark each missing item as needs_verification.
steps.human_prompt: Attach vendor onboarding documents or mark missing items before compliance review.

stages.name: Review Compliance Readiness
stages.description: Verify vendor documents and decide whether onboarding can proceed.

steps.title: Verify vendor compliance package
steps.instructions: Verify W-9 completeness, COI dates and limits, license if required, agreement status, rate sheet, service-area fit, trade mapping, and dispatch restrictions. Do not mark compliant or dispatch-eligible.
steps.dispatch_body: Verify vendor onboarding compliance package. No activation and no external sends.

steps.title: Approve vendor compliance
steps.instructions: Approve, reject, or request corrections before any AppFolio, PropertyMeld, dispatch pool, or payment setup checklist is staged.
steps.human_prompt: Approve vendor compliance before setup or dispatch eligibility is staged.

stages.name: Stage Setup Handoff
stages.description: Prepare checklist-only system setup and compliance tracking handoffs.

steps.title: Prepare vendor system setup checklist
steps.instructions: Prepare checklist-only setup fields for AppFolio, PropertyMeld, dispatch trades, service area, payment setup, W-9, COI expiry, and rate sheet. Do not write to AppFolio, PropertyMeld, payment systems, or dispatch pools.
steps.dispatch_body: Prepare internal vendor setup checklist only. No system writes and no external sends.

steps.title: Queue vendor COI tracking
steps.instructions: Stage internal handoff facts for the existing vendor-coi-verification workflow, including vendor refs, COI expiry, coverage status, and needs_verification flags. Do not create live crons or dispatch changes.
steps.dispatch_body: Stage internal handoff to vendor-coi-verification. No live scheduling or system writes.

steps.title: Record vendor onboarding outcome
steps.instructions: Record onboarding outcome, approved trade scope, restrictions, missing items, setup checklist refs, and activation decision source. Do not activate the vendor.
steps.dispatch_body: Record internal vendor onboarding outcome. No activation and no external sends.
